tools.name: device.createDeviceCode
tools.description: Issues a new Access token (optionally identity_token & refresh_token) in exchange of Oauth grant

tools.name: token.createToken
tools.description: Issues a new Access token (optionally identity_token & refresh_token) in exchange of Oauth grant

tools.name: userinfo.fetchUserInfo
tools.description: Retrieves the consented UserInfo and other claims about the logged-in subject (end-user).

tools.name: wellKnown.fetchOpenidDiscovery
tools.description: Fetch configuration details about the OpenID Connect Authorization Server

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
